HeroPointReplacement.Label: Use as Hero Point replacement
HeroPointReplacement.Hint: Replaces the individual hero points with this shared group resource.

HPM.PoolTooltip: Shared hero point pool: {name} (left click +1 / right click −1)
HPM.NoPermission: You lack permission to change the group pool. Owner permission on the party actor is required.

FreeHeroPoint.Label: free
FreeHeroPoint.Hint: Free hero point – automatically marked as used when spent (one-time). Toggleable with owner permission on the party actor.
FreeHeroPoint.NoneFree: No member currently has a free hero point.
FreeHeroPoint.PoolFull: The pool is already full – nothing transferred.
